---
title: "Portland Metropolitan Area, Oregon"
subtitle: "2008, 2012, 2017, 2023"
number: 22
image: /images/portland_OR.jpg
image-alt: "Image of Portland, Oregon"
categories: ["Transfer/MRF/Transport", "Service Procurement"]
---
{{< include _return-to-pf.qmd >}}

::: {.article}

# 2023 Service Agency Transfer Station Cost of Service Study

# 2019 Transfer Station Contractor Operator Procurement

# 2016 Transfer Station Cost of Service Study

# 2012 Transfer Station Repair & Replacement Study

Bell & Associates was a subcontractor to URS for the transfer station repair
and replacement study. Bell & Associates completed the financial analysis of
the study of Metro’s two transfer stations and closed landfill. The study
reviewed the facilities and equipment at all three sites to identify what
repairs and replacements are necessary during the next 20 years. Bell &
Associates reviewed the current fund balances for transfer stations as well as
the closure account for the St. John’s Landfill to determine if the current
balances and contributions were adequate to fund future operational needs and
asset replacement.

# 2008 Transfer Station Repair & Replacement Study

TODO: Contents

[By Cacophony - Own work, CC BY-SA 3.0](https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/index.php?curid=2335737)

:::
